payload.text:
Mustafa's Cuts — help 💈

Here's what I can do right now:
/start — Open the main menu (Book, Services, Contact)
/help  — Show this help message

Tip: most things are easier from the menu — just tap /start.

name: T03: an unknown command gets a friendly hint, not silence
T03: an unknown command with @botname suffix still gets the friendly hint
T03: an unknown command with trailing args still gets the friendly hint
T03: /start still works when the unknown-command guard is in place

payload.text:
